problem: What is the primary molecular cause of biological aging — can it be slowed?
mechanism: Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier
hypothesis: If Nanoparticle delivery to cross blood-brain barrier is applied to it, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
